reasoning: The film *Highest 2 Lowest* is a gritty, modern crime thriller set in New York City with a "bootleg VHS" visual aesthetic. It lacks any of the hallmarks of Best Makeup & Hairstyling nominees (such as transformative prosthetics, major aging makeup, fantasy/sci-fi creatures, or elaborate period hairstyling). Because it does not fit the historical profile of nominees in this category and has no buzz for it, the probability of it even being nominated, let alone winning, is extremely low.
